Speech Therapy/Audiology Start Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the start date for the most recent speech-language therapy regimen. discontinued 09/30/2025
515 O0400A6_SPCH_THRPY_END_DT O0400A6_SPCH_THRPY_END_DT O0400A6 Speech Therapy/Audiology End Date CHAR 8 The data in this column indicates the end date for the most recent speech-language therapy regimen. discontinued 09/30/2025
